---
title: "Figure 5 — pairwise log-likelihood differences between algorithms"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
Which algorithmic feature earns its place? Filled contour of the difference in summed log-likelihood
(Moment_statistics_Sum_logL, at the truth) between pairs of algorithms, over the design plane
(x = interval, y = N_ch). Columns are the four contrasts, rows the three noise levels:
  IR - R    : does the integrated measurement help over plain recursive?
  MR - R    : does M help over R?  (mostly NEGATIVE -> M hurts the recursive)
  R - NR    : does recursion help? (huge, always positive)
  MNR - NR  : does M help over NR? (positive)
Positive (red) = the FIRST algorithm fits better. Shared symmetric symlog scale (the differences span 0.3
to ~10^6 logL units). Grey dots mark the measured cells (N_ch 10/100/1e3/1e4, the set common to all algos).
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r params}
DATA_DIR <- "../data/433ed13"
NSIM     <- 10000
NOISES   <- c("0.1", "1", "10")
ALGOS    <- c("macro_NR", "macro_NMR", "macro_R", "macro_MR", "macro_IR")
LGL      <- "Probit_statistics_Moment_statistics_Sum_logL"
DIFF_LEV <- c("IR - R", "MR - R", "R - NR", "MNR - NR")

# symmetric symlog scale in logL units; white band (-0.3, 0.3] = same fit
POS    <- c(0.3, 1, 3, 10, 30, 100, 300, 1000, 1e4, 1e5, 1e6)
BREAKS <- c(-Inf, -rev(POS), POS, Inf)                          # 23 bands
PAL <- colorRampPalette(c("#021024", "#053061", "#2166AC", "#4393C3", "#92C5DE", "#D1E5F0",
                          "#F7F7F7",
                          "#FDDBC7", "#F4A582", "#D6604D", "#B2182B", "#67001F", "#3d0011")
                        )(length(BREAKS) - 1)
edge <- BREAKS[-1]
fmt  <- function(x) ifelse(is.infinite(x), ifelse(x > 0, "Inf", "-Inf"), formatC(x, format = "g", digits = 1))
KEEP <- c(-1e5, -1000, -30, -1, 1, 30, 1000, 1e5)
LAB  <- ifelse(edge %in% KEEP, fmt(edge), "")
```

```{r read}
read_logL <- function(a, z) {
  map_dfr(Sys.glob(file.path(DATA_DIR, sprintf("figure_3_nch_*_nsim_%d_%s_noise_%s_battery_sim.csv", NSIM, a, z))),
          ~ read.csv(.x, skip = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)) %>%
    filter(component_path == LGL, statistic == "mean", probit == "mean") %>%
    group_by(Num_ch, interval_in_tau) %>% summarise(logL = mean(value), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(algo = a, noise = z)
}
d <- map_dfr(ALGOS, function(a) map_dfr(NOISES, function(z) read_logL(a, z)))
w <- d %>% pivot_wider(names_from = algo, values_from = logL)

dd <- w %>%
  transmute(Num_ch, interval_in_tau, noise,
            `IR - R`   = macro_IR  - macro_R,
            `MR - R`   = macro_MR  - macro_R,
            `R - NR`   = macro_R   - macro_NR,
            `MNR - NR` = macro_NMR - macro_NR) %>%
  pivot_longer(-c(Num_ch, interval_in_tau, noise), names_to = "diff", values_to = "D") %>%
  filter(is.finite(D)) %>%
  mutate(lx = log10(interval_in_tau), ly = log10(Num_ch),
         diff_f = factor(diff, levels = DIFF_LEV),
         noisef = factor(paste("noise", noise), levels = paste("noise", NOISES)))
```

```{r plot, fig.width = 7.0, fig.height = 5.6}
X_BRK <- log10(c(.01, .1, 1));           X_LAB <- c(".01", ".1", "1")
Y_BRK <- log10(c(10, 100, 1000, 10000)); Y_LAB <- c("10", "100", "1e3", "1e4")

g <- ggplot(dd, aes(lx, ly, z = D)) +
  geom_contour_filled(breaks = BREAKS) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = PAL, drop = FALSE, labels = LAB,
                    name = expression(Delta * " logL  (first - second)"),
                    guide = guide_legend(nrow = 1, byrow = TRUE, label.position = "bottom",
                                         title.position = "left", title.vjust = 0.9,
                                         keywidth = unit(0.34, "cm"), keyheight = unit(0.30, "cm"))) +
  geom_point(size = .5, colour = "grey25", alpha = .5) +
  facet_grid(noisef ~ diff_f) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = X_BRK, labels = X_LAB) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = Y_BRK, labels = Y_LAB) +
  labs(x = expression(Delta / tau[min]), y = expression(N[ch])) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9, base_family = "Helvetica") +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = 8), legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
        legend.key.spacing.x = unit(0, "pt"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 7), axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 8))
g
ggsave("Figure_5_logL_diff_grid.pdf", g, width = 7.0, height = 5.6)
```
